column1: # Schema (tab-separated, one row per copied file):
#   legacy_path   - path to the original .swift file in the podcast-player repo
#                   (relative to the repo root, e.g. App/Sources/Features/Home/HomeView.swift)
#   copied_path   - path to the destination .swift file in the NMP repo
#   sha256        - SHA-256 hex digest of the copied file at the time of copy,
#                   used to detect drift between legacy and migrated versions
# Columns are separated by a single TAB character.
# Lines beginning with '#' are comments and are ignored by tooling.
# The header row (below) uses literal column names.
